ars_ingressum.page.vacant_tuning_fork: A Tuning Fork serves as a guide when traveling through dimensions. Attune a vacant Fork to a desired dimension using the Imbuement Chamber, or by right-clicking a Planarium. Reattuning an already attuned Tuning Fork will also replenish its uses.
ars_ingressum.ritual_desc.ritual_plane_s: Teleports all nearby entities to their approximate coordinates at a different dimension. Before starting the ritual, you must first augment the ritual with an attuned Tuning Fork to set the destination. The ritual will fail if no nearby safe coordinates are found at the destination, or the destination is the same as the origin.
ars_ingressum.tuning_fork.planarium_dim_: The selected Planarium doesn't hold a pocket dimension inside it. Try creating one first...
chat.ars_ingressum.attuning.attuning_sta: Attuning. Add source nearby to increase attuning speed.
